case_title: LEROY POLAR VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY POLAR, LEROY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
